Powell described the U.S. economy as "very unusual" due to tariff-induced goods inflation persisting amid a potentially weaker labor market, with official payrolls overstating job growth by ~60,000/month[1].

signals.headline: XRP ETF Inflows Surge to $41
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Inflows Surge to $41.64M for Week Ending April 16 | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][6]  
U.S. spot XRP ETFs saw their largest single-week net inflows in three months at $41.64 million, a 254% jump from the prior week's $11.75 million, with consistent daily demand ($11.87M, $17.11M, $11.20M, $1.46M, $9.09M) pushing cumulative inflows to $1.26 billion and assets over $1.08 billion[1][6].
